_comment: Hand-authored MODERN-register clues for common answers that had zero. One fresh clue per answer here — contemporary, colloquial voice per STYLE.md. Merged into the wordbank by scripts/author-modern-clues.mjs, tagged register:'modern'.

STAR.text: Emoji you tap to save a favorite tweet

TIME.text: What you're always "out of" before a deadline

OCEAN.text: What a plastic straw ban is trying to save

PARIS.text: City on every "before I die" bucket list

SUNSET.text: The photo everyone's camera roll is 40% full of

DOG.text: Best excuse for a work-from-home Zoom interruption
